name: performance_two_site_bandit_cannibal_v0_2026-04-29
description: Two-site performance-audit footing: starts from the green one-site remembered-lead bandit fixture, then seeds a second camp-shaped cannibal_camp 10 OMT east of the player. It deliberately does not seed smoke/fire/map fields, so the row measures mixed bandit+cannibal active hostile-site cadence with signals=0 rather than signal responsiveness or blocked player-lit fire behavior.
